author: dearvikki
description: Convert highlights, underlines, bolded texts or any selected texts into clozes.

manifest.author: Vikki
manifest.description: Convert highlights, underlines, bolded texts or any selected texts into clozes.
manifest.name: Cloze

name: Cloze

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
✨ Feats:
- Hover the cloze to reveal. #36 

🐛 Fix: 
- Clozes not clickable when note opened in a new window. #30 
---

✨ 新功能:
- 可以开启鼠标悬浮显示填空内容咯！#36

🐛 Fix: 
- new window 模式下打开时，cloze 失效的问题 #30

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
🤏🏻🐛 Slightly Fix:
- Remove redundant underlines for underlined texts. #28 
----
🤏🏻🐛 一丢丢 Fix:
- 下划线模式的双下划线去掉了！ #28

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
🐛 Fix:
- Keep clozes revealed in live preview mode. #26 
- Add a title for hints to help solve the issue where hints cannot be revealed properly in clozes with fixed width.   #27 
----
🐛 Fix:
- 修复表格在编辑模式下的填空默认为隐藏问题 #26 
- 给 hint 添加 title，暂时解决 hint 在固定长度的填空下显示不全问题 #27

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
🐛 Fix:
- Toggle all clozes in canvas is not showing the cloze's state in real time. #23 
- And clicking cloze in canvas also works! 🚀  #12 
----
🐛 Fix:
- 支持 Canvas 下的 toggle all 操作 #23 
-  Canvas 下的 cloze 也可以点击了！实属意外之喜 🚀 #12

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Fix More:
- Toggle all clozes not working for multiple tabs. #18

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
🐛 A Lot Of Fixes: 
- Not working for embedded cloze segments. #20 
- Toggle all clozes not working for multiple tabs. #18 
- Incorrect display of the 'More Hint' feature during line breaks #17 
---

🐛 一堆 Fixes: 
- cloze 内嵌部分点击失灵 #20 
- 多 tab 下「显示/隐藏所有 cloze」不生效 #18 
- cloze 换行情况下, hint 样式异常 #17

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
✨ Feats:
- May automatically display hint using the first few letters or a percentage of the cloze content. #13 
- May right click the hidden cloze to dynamically reveal a portion of the cloze.

⚡ Enhancements:
- "Toggle all" works indepedently in edit mode and reading mode.
-----

✨ 新功能:
- 可以根据填空内容自动设置填空提示咯！#13
- 右键点击隐藏的填空，可以选择「提示更多」，以显示填空的更多部分内容。

⚡ 优化:
- 填空显隐的状态在编辑模式与阅读模式下互相独立。

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
✨ Feats: 
- Add command for toggling all clozes. 🍺 Credits to @evisx #15 

🐛 Fix: 
- Page links not hidden by Cloze. #14 

---

✨ 新功能: 
- 新增「显隐所有填空」的命令 #15 

🐛 Fix: 
- 页面链接未能隐藏的问题 #14

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
✨ Feats:
- Support auto convert for text enclosed in curly brackets. 🍺 Credits to @edmund-leibert #11 
- Support auto convert italics. #10 
---

✨ 新功能:
- 支持花括号内文本自动转换为 cloze #11 
- 支持斜体文本自动转换为 cloze #10

releases.author: github-actions[bot]

releases.author: github-actions[bot]

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
🍺 Credits to @tbrams #7 

✨ Feats:
- Support tag selector in notes.

⚡ Enhancements:
- Cloze class only added on top container when in need.
- 「Toggle all」also works in edit mode.
---

✨ 新功能:
- 支持根据页面标签启用 cloze

⚡ 优化:
- 仅在预览页面最外层的 container 新增 cloze class
- 侧边栏「显隐所有填空」在编辑模式下也可使用

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:

- Support cloze hint. #6 
- Support fixed cloze width.

:sparkles:新功能:
- 支持填空提示 #6 
- 支持固定填空宽度
